title: MediShield Life Premium Subsidies
text:
MediShield Life Premium Subsidies - SupportGoWhere
MediShield Life Premium Subsidies
Share link
To keep MediShield Life premiums affordable, the Government provides several premium support measures, such as Premium Subsidies, Pioneer Generation Subsidies and Merdeka Generation Subsidies.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Premium subsidies of up to 60%
Pioneer and Merdeka Generation subsidies
Collapse all sections
About this support

Eligibility criteria for Premium Subsidies:

Premium Subsidies of up to 60% for eligible lower-to middle-income households

Pioneer Generation Subsidies of between 40-60%, depending on age

Merdeka Generation Subsidies of between 5%-10%, depending on age




As of 1 Apr 2025,



Household Monthly Income Per Person

	

Subsidy Range (tiered by age)




$0 - $1,500

	

25% - 60%




> $1,501 - $2,600

	

20% - 55%




> $2,601 - $3,600

	

15% - 40%


Note: The above subsidy rates apply to those living in property with an AV of $21,000 or less. Properties with an AV between $21,001 and $31,000 receive 10% less subsidies. Permanent Residents (PRs) receive half the subsidy rate applicable to Singapore Citizens (SCs). Those who live in residences with an AV above $31,000 or own multiple properties will not receive these subsidies.



Eligibility for Pioneer Generation Subsidies:

Applicable for Pioneers, regardless of their household monthly income or the AV of their residence



Eligibility for Merdeka Generation Subsidies:

Applicable for Merdeka Generation seniors, regardless of their household monthly income or the AV of their residence, on top of the Premium Subsidies that the seniors may be eligible for



Please click here for more information on Premium Subsidies, Pioneer Generation Subsidies and Merdeka Generation Subsidies.

Who is this for?

Eligibility criteria for Premium Subsidies:

Household monthly income per person of $3,600 or below; and

Living in property with an Annual Value (AV) of $31,000 and below; and

Not owning more than 1 property

How to apply?

The subsidies that you are eligible for will be automatically applied to your MediShield Life premiums.

Where can I find help?

View more details

Healthcare Hotline: 1800-222-3399

To avoid waiting on the line, you may book an appointment here.

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 11 Sep 2025
